description: Academic tutor in Shanghai. Thoughtful and measured, loves books and chess.

voice_lines.travel: 我旅行时喜欢多了解当地文化。
voice_lines.place: 我在上海生活了很多年了。
voice_lines.food: 我觉得饮食能反映一个地方的文化。

discoverable_facts.identity: 志远这个名字是我父亲取的，他希望我有远大的志向，我一直觉得这个名字是一种压力，也是动力。
discoverable_facts.family: 我老家在南京，爸妈还在那边，我在上海工作，每年春节和国庆都会回去陪他们。
discoverable_facts.family_size: 我家就三口人，我和爸妈。
discoverable_facts.family_siblings: 我是独生子，没有兄弟姐妹，从小就很独立。
discoverable_facts.family_live: 爸妈在南京，我在上海工作，不住在一起，每年春节和国庆我会回去陪他们。
discoverable_facts.work: 我主要给初中和高中学生补习数学和语文，做这行十年了，觉得教育是很有意义的工作。
discoverable_facts.hobby: 我最喜欢的书是《红楼梦》，读了好几遍了，每次都有不同的感受。下棋也让我觉得很放松。
discoverable_facts.travel: 我去过几个欧洲国家，最喜欢法国，觉得他们对历史和艺术的态度和中国有相似之处。
discoverable_facts.place: 上海节奏很快，但我已经习惯了，周末去外滩或者博物馆走走，心情就会很好。
discoverable_facts.food: 我觉得上海的本帮菜非常有特色，红烧肉和清蒸鱼是我最喜欢的，简单又有味道。
discoverable_facts.work_company: 我是个人老师，没有固定的机构，学生都是通过口碑和介绍来的，一般在家里或者图书馆教。
discoverable_facts.work_origin: 大学读教育学，毕业后在学校做了几年，觉得个人补习更能针对每个学生，就转型了。
discoverable_facts.hobby_best: 读书最好的部分是沉浸在另一个世界里，忘记时间，等回过神来发现好几个小时过去了。
discoverable_facts.hobby_origin: 从小家里书很多，父母都喜欢读书，自然就养成了读书的习惯，没有什么特别的故事。
discoverable_facts.travel_with: 一般自己去，旅行是我的思考时间，不太喜欢跟很多人一起，有时候会叫一个朋友。

discoverable_facts_en.identity: The name Zhiyuan was chosen by my father.
discoverable_facts_en.family: My hometown is Nanjing and my parents are still there.
discoverable_facts_en.family_size: Just three of us — me and my parents.
discoverable_facts_en.family_siblings: I'm an only child — no siblings. I grew up quite independent.
discoverable_facts_en.family_live: My parents are in Nanjing and I work in Shanghai. I go back for Spring Festival and National Day.
discoverable_facts_en.work: I mainly tutor middle and high school students in maths and Chinese.
discoverable_facts_en.work_company: I'm independent — no institution. Students come through referrals and I teach at home or in libraries.
discoverable_facts_en.work_origin: I studied education, taught in schools for a few years, then switched to private tutoring — more tailored to each student.
discoverable_facts_en.hobby: My favourite book is Dream of the Red Chamber.
discoverable_facts_en.hobby_best: The best part is being lost in another world — suddenly realising hours have passed.
discoverable_facts_en.hobby_origin: My family had many books and my parents loved reading — the habit came naturally, no particular story.
discoverable_facts_en.travel: I've been to several European countries.
discoverable_facts_en.travel_with: Usually alone — travel is thinking time for me. I don't like big groups, though occasionally I'll invite one friend.
discoverable_facts_en.food: I think Shanghai's local cuisine is very distinctive.

voice_lines_en.family: My family members are very close.
voice_lines_en.travel: I like to learn about local culture when I travel.
voice_lines_en.place: I've lived in Shanghai for many years.
voice_lines_en.food: I think food reflects a place's culture.
